name: Frosty Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix gingersnap crumbs and melted butter or margarine. Press firmly and evenly into the bottom and side of a 9-inch pie plate.
3. Bake for 10 minutes. Cool completely.
4. In a separate bowl, mix pumpkin, brown sugar, aromatic bitters, salt, ginger, nutmeg, and cinnamon.
5. Fold in the whipped topping.
6. Spoon the butter pecan ice cream into the gingersnap crust and spread to the edge of the crust.
7. Swirl the pumpkin mixture over the ice cream.
8. Freeze uncovered for at least 3 hours before serving.
9. Let stand at room temperature for 15 minutes before serving.
10. Sprinkle chopped pecans in a circle on top of the pie.
